The powder-coated motor resists water and chemicals, while the reinforced plastic housing components resist chlorine. The CF GROUP Aqua Plus 8 filter pump is self-priming. It is installed a maximum of 2 m above the water level and 3 m below the water level. items.raw_desc: WiFi router TP-Link Archer GE400 Gaming:The TP-Link Archer GE400 is a powerful dual-band gaming router with support for the latest Wi-Fi 7 standard, designed for the ultimate in smooth online gaming, streaming and high data demands. With a combined speed of up to 6.5 Gbps and technologies such as 4K-QAM and Multi-Link Operation, it offers extremely low latency and stable transmission even under full network load.
